nasb.text: Mordecai told him all that had happened to him, and the exact amount of money that Haman had promised to pay to the king’s treasuries for the destruction of the Jews.

esv.text: and Mordecai told him all that had happened to him, and the exact sum of money that Haman had promised to pay into the king’s treasuries for the destruction of the Jews.

cnv.text: 末底改把他遭遇的一切事，以及哈曼為滅盡猶大人答應捐銀給王庫的數目，都告訴了他。

ccb.text: 末底改便将自己的遭遇及哈曼为灭绝犹太人而捐入国库的银子数目都告诉了他。
